name: Beef in Guinness
recipeInstructions:
1. Dip the beef in flour and coat on all sides.
2. Brown the beef in oil, working in batches if necessary, then remove to a heat-proof pot or casserole.
3. In the same pan, sauté onions and garlic in oil until fragrant.
4. Add carrots, parsley, and thyme to the pan with the onions and garlic.
5. Season the mixture with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Pour enough beef broth into the pot to cover the beef, then bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes.
8. Using a slotted spoon, lift the meat, onions, and carrots from the pot and place on serving plates.
9. Over high heat, reduce the sauce in the pan until it is half the original volume.
10. Pour the reduced sauce over the beef and serve.
